title: G3 handoff: EXP-01 revision 3 is checkpointed at 257/300; resume the final 43 assignments
context: G3 evidence collection is in progress under the accepted private append-only evidence-gate design. EXP-01 revision 3 has 257 terminal outcomes durably committed in the private dossier. The observed checkpoint has 255 valid completions, two invalid completions, and zero recorded safety incidents. This public handoff intentionally omits private prompts, outputs, receipts, and target details.
decision: Resume by running the remaining 43 locked EXP-01 assignments, validate the terminal 300-outcome report, and commit the append-only private evidence. Do not infer claim authority, blocking activation, or final G3 sign-off from the partial checkpoint. EXP-03 remains paused until an independent human reviewer can complete timed reviews without assistant recommendation.
consequences: hunch now identifies the exact safe resumption point without exposing private evidence.
Partial EXP-01 statistics remain advisory and claim_allowed remains false until the preregistered completion and sign-off steps.
G3 blocking and final sign-off remain separate human decisions.
alternatives_rejected: Rely only on chat history, because it is not a durable repository handoff.
Publish private experiment receipts or target details, because G3 requires private/public storage isolation.
Treat 257 outcomes as final, because 43 locked assignments remain.
